name: Fire Fighter's Chili No. 2682
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces canned kidney or pinto beans, drained and rinsed
1/2 teaspoon beef flavor instant bouillon granules
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the sausage from its casing.
2. Brown the sausage and ground beef in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Remove the browned meat and drain any excess fat, reserving the drippings as noted.
4. Return the reserved drippings to the skillet.
5. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic. Cook for 3 minutes.
6. Return the meats to the skillet.
7. Stir in all remaining ingredients except salt and pepper.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
9. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer.
10. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
11. Season with salt and pepper to taste before serving.
